Bash(curl -sk -X POST https://backboard.railway.app/graphql/v2 \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer 183c00d5-7531-4e54-8d6d-52116be723a0" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"query":"{ deploymentLogs\(deploymentId: \\"a0bf5fa7-5e21-4148-bdda-1aa234c4a810\\"\) { message } }"}' 2>&1 | python -c "import sys,json; logs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(l['message']\) for l in logs.get\('data',{}\).get\('deploymentLogs',[]\)]" 2>&1 | tail -50)

Bash(curl -sk -X POST https://backboard.railway.app/graphql/v2 \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer 183c00d5-7531-4e54-8d6d-52116be723a0" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"query":"{ buildLogs\(deploymentId: \\"a0bf5fa7-5e21-4148-bdda-1aa234c4a810\\"\) { message } }"}' 2>&1 | python -c "
import sys,json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
logs = data.get\('data',{}\).get\('buildLogs',[]\)
for l in logs[-80:]:
    print\(l['message']\)
" 2>&1)

  -H "Authorization: Bearer 183c00d5-7531-4e54-8d6d-52116be723a0" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"query":"{ project\(id: \\"f348c163-c857-48ec-b255-698e8a10b39c\\"\) { services { edges { node { deployments { edges { node { id status createdAt } } } } } } } }"}' | python -c "

    print\(n['status'], n['createdAt'], n['id']\)
")
